creator: webmaster@china.com
text:
using the boot floppy downloaded for bsd 2.2.7, the network drivers do not list
the compaq netelligent device, and the network device has no drivers compatible.

this is contrary to the release notes in the 2.2.7 documentation

Fix: 

add the driver or change the release notes!
How-To-Repeat: download the boot floppy and install it on a compaq proliant 1600 with netelligent ethernet card
